title: Snap Circuits SCROV-10 Remote Control
short description: A remote control transmission from the controller from an Elenco Snap Circuits SCROV-10 kit.
description:
The remote transmits an idle signal, even when no buttons are being pressed.
The remote also has a "channel" switch to move between 3 different channels.
